goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'east'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to have free parking' and should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Make sure you get 'star of the hotel'.
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'italian' food and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the hotel'.
Once you find the 'restaurant' you want to book a table for '6 people' at '14:45' on 'saturday'.
If the booking fails how about '13:45'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant 'by the booked time'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the east
The hotel doesn't need to have free parking and should be in the type of guesthouse
Make sure you get star of the hotel
You are also looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the moderate price range
The restaurant should be in the same area as the hotel
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 6 people at 14:45 on saturday
If the booking fails how about 13:45
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
